name: Chopper (SS-342)
events: This page was last updated in April 2017.
13 Jun 1945 USS Chopper (Lt.Cdr. S. Filipone, USN) arrived at Newport, Rhode Island from New London, Connecticut for torpedo trials.
16 Jun 1945 Having completed her torpedo trials, USS Chopper (Lt.Cdr. S. Filipone, USN), returned to New London, Connecticut.
4 Jul 1945 USS Chopper (Lt.Cdr. S. Filipone, USN) departed New London, Connecticut for Key West, Florida.
8 Jul 1945 USS Chopper (Lt.Cdr. S. Filipone, USN) arrived at Key West, Florida from New London, Connecticut.
10 Jul 1945 USS Chopper (Lt.Cdr. S. Filipone, USN) conducted exercises off Key West.
11 Jul 1945 USS Chopper (Lt.Cdr. S. Filipone, USN) conducted exercises off Key West.
12 Jul 1945 USS Chopper (Lt.Cdr. S. Filipone, USN) conducted exercises off Key West.
13 Jul 1945 USS Chopper (Lt.Cdr. S. Filipone, USN) conducted exercises off Key West.
14 Jul 1945 USS Chopper (Lt.Cdr. S. Filipone, USN) conducted exercises off Key West.
16 Jul 1945 USS Chopper (Lt.Cdr. S. Filipone, USN) conducted exercises off Key West.
17 Jul 1945 USS Chopper (Lt.Cdr. S. Filipone, USN) conducted exercises off Key West.
18 Jul 1945 USS Chopper (Lt.Cdr. S. Filipone, USN) conducted exercises off Key West.
19 Jul 1945 USS Chopper (Lt.Cdr. S. Filipone, USN) conducted exercises off Key West.
20 Jul 1945 USS Chopper (Cdr. S. Filipone, USN) conducted exercises off Key West.
21 Jul 1945 USS Chopper (Cdr. S. Filipone, USN) conducted exercises off Key West.
23 Jul 1945 USS Chopper (Cdr. S. Filipone, USN) conducted exercises off Key West.
24 Jul 1945 USS Chopper (Cdr. S. Filipone, USN) departed Key West, Florida for the Panama Canal Zone.
28 Jul 1945 USS Chopper (Cdr. S. Filipone, USN) arrived in the Panama Canal Zone from Key West, Florida.
13 Aug 1945 USS Chopper (Cdr. S. Filipone, USN) departed the Panama Canal Zone for Pearl Harbor.

24 Aug 1945 USS Chopper (Cdr. S. Filipone, USN) returned to the Panama Canal Zone. With the war now over she was ordered to return to the Atlantic. In the end she was ordered to proceed to Pearl Harbor after all where she arrived on 21 September 1945.
